prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约13474名、15251名、12803名、15214名、14801名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2022年较2021年后移约1777名，2023年反弹 至12803名后，2024年又回落至15214名，2025年小幅回升至14801名。近3年位次在12800–15200区间震荡，2025年基准位次约14801名；该校在福建省物理类招生 计划持续扩增：2021年38人、2022年40人、2023年40人、2024年44人、2025年46人，2026年（据招生计划文件）进一步扩至50人，较2025年增加4人，扩招幅度约8.7%。扩招意味 着竞争压力略有缓解，对位次有后移（数字增大）的推动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第76位，属 于全国百强高校，在矿业与安全工程领域具有突出行业地位；该校2022年曾出现师德师风相关负面舆情事件，但影响已随时间淡化；2026年声誉评价为中性/混 合，无重大负面冲击。抖音平台热度排名未进入前100，整体关注度一般，未出现明显的报考热度异常信号；安全科学与工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），测绘科学 与技术为A-，土木工程为A-。这些优势学科与该校在福建招生的安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木工程等专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业（计算机、电气、人工智能等）录取位次常年位居前列；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显 降温。福建省物理类考生数持续增长：2021年11.7万→2025年19.2万，2026年总考生约26.79万，估算物理类约20.36万人，较2025年增加约6%，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。省 控线方面，2025年物；该校位于北京市，属于在京211高校，对福建省考生具有一定地 域吸引力；学校在福建省招生计划逐年增加，2026年计划50人，占比较小但持续扩招，反映学校对福建生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划扩 招约8.7%（推动位次后移）、福建省物理类考生增加约6%（加剧竞争，推动位次前移）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增长效应，但考生规模扩大对竞争格局有实 质性影响。预计2026年最低录取位次约15373名，较2025年14801名小幅后移约572名；位次区间为14873–15873名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约15373名，区间14873–15873名。建议位次在14800名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档热门专业（电气、计算机、人工智能）；位次在14800–15500名之间的考生以二档专业 为主力选择（安全科学与工程A+学科、数学类、机械类等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在15500名以后的考生可重点考虑三档专业保底，其中智能采矿工程和测绘类为学校特色优势方 向，性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13474, 15251, 12803, 15214, and 14801 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward-moving trend. In 2022, the ranking moved back by about 1777 places compared to 2021. After rebounding to 12803 in 2023, it fell back to 15214 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 14801 in 2025. In the past three years, rankings have oscillated within the 12800–15200 range, with a baseline ranking of about 14801 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province has been continuously expanding: 38 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 46 in 2025, and further expanding to 50 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of 4 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 8.7%. Expansion means slightly eased competition pressure, which has a pushing effect on rankings moving backward (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranked 76th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the national top 100 universities, with outstanding industry status in the fields of mining and safety engineering. The university experienced a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics in 2022, but its impact has faded over time. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative shocks. The popularity ranking on the Douyin platform did not enter the top 100, with overall attention being average, and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. Safety Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-. These advantageous disciplines directly correspond to the majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering that the university recruits in Fujian, which have a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity. The admission rankings for related majors (Computer, Electrical, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) at this university are often among the top. Civil and architectural majors have significantly cooled in social popularity. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has been continuously increasing: 117,000 in 2021 → 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated total of about 267,900 examinees in 2026, of which about 203,600 are estimated to be in Physics Category, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025. The expansion of the examinee scale has intensified overall competition. Regarding the provincial control line, in 2025, the Physics Category... The university is located in Beijing, a 211 university in the capital, which has a certain regional appeal to Fujian Province examinees. The university's enrollment plan in Fujian Province has been increasing year by year, with 50 planned for 2026, accounting for a small proportion but continuous expansion, reflecting the university's emphasis on Fujian students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trends, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 8.7% (pushing rankings backward), the increase of about 6% in Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province (intensifying competition, pushing rankings forward), and the stable reputation of the university, the expansion effect is slightly greater than the examinee growth effect, but the expansion of examinee scale has a substantial impact on the competitive landscape. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 15373, a slight backward movement of about 572 places compared to 14801 in 2025; the ranking range is 14873–15873.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Class (including Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Carbon Storage Science and Engineering
- Mathematics Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Safety Science and Engineering Class (including Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Surveying and Mapping Class (including Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Business Administration Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 15373, with a range of 14873–15873. It is recommended that examinees with rankings within 14800 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical, Computer, Artificial Intelligence); examinees with rankings between 14800–15500 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering A+ discipline, Mathematics Class, Mechanical Class, etc.), while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; examinees with rankings after 15500 can focus on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, among which Intelligent Mining Engineering and Surveying and Mapping Class are the university's characteristic advantageous directions with high cost-effectiveness.
